purpose: Turn the full-objective other-market/full-species source-label gap into a concrete source-owned acquisition request without using proxy labels or downloading raw data.

target_packages.label_scope: MainRegimeV2 price roots: Bull, Bear, Sideways, Crisis
needed_timeframes: 15m/5m only after source-date overlap is proven
target_packages.acceptance_gate: chronological calibration/heldout-time/heldout-market splits with Wilson95 LCB >= 0.95 per root; no pooled context promoted as ticker-specific support
target_packages.why_needed: Current daily stock denominator is strong, but NQ/QQQ/futures/source-label equivalence and native sub-hour coverage are not closed.

required_symbols: BTC perpetual or spot venue-native equivalent
target_packages.label_scope: MainRegimeV2 price roots: Bull, Bear, Sideways, Crisis
needed_timeframes: native sub-hour only after overlap proof
target_packages.needed_period: 2000-01-03 through latest available 2026+ extension where source-owned labels exist
target_packages.acceptance_gate: same source-owned label policy and chronological/market/timeframe splits as price roots
target_packages.why_needed: Full-market/full-species objective still needs cross-market equivalence beyond the stock source panel.

target_packages.label_scope: MainRegimeV2 price roots: Bull, Bear, Sideways, Crisis
target_packages.acceptance_gate: source-owned regime labels or owner-approved equivalence manifest; no OHLCV-derived backfill
target_packages.why_needed: The objective asks other markets/full species, and current accepted root denominator is concentrated in stock-market-regimes source labels.

required_symbols: source-owned symbols with post-2026-01-30 labels and native provider overlap
target_packages.label_scope: Exact source-date labels for 1m/5m/15m/30m/90m only when overlap exists
target_packages.needed_period: post-2026-01-30 source-owned extension first; sub-hour overlap second
target_packages.acceptance_gate: source-date overlap exists before calibration; no broad sub-hour sweep without labels
target_packages.why_needed: Native sub-hour source overlap remains blocked until recency labels exist.

target_packages.label_scope: Direct timestamped event/order-flow/order-lifecycle/social rows with matched normal controls
target_packages.needed_period: source-owned periods sufficient for chronological calibration and heldout validation
target_packages.acceptance_gate: positive rows plus matched negative controls and provenance manifest; missing varieties remain abstain
target_packages.why_needed: Scoped direct Manipulation factor exists, but full species coverage is incomplete.

next_action: Use the required schema and target package CSV to request or import source-owned labels; after data arrives, run exact same gates without threshold relaxation.
